lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: Welcome to the Ardougne Zoo! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: Not at the moment. The explorers that come back from far away lands tell such amazing tales. Make sure you keep eyes and ears open as you may find new places to explore!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did you get the animals from?

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: We get them from all over the place! The most exotic creatures have been brought back by explorers and sold to us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where on Gielinor did you get that scary looking Cyclops?!

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: He's from a very far away land, we couldn't find out more as the explorer who brought him back died shortly afterwards!

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: Please tell me how many animals there are.

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: Sorry, but that doesn't sound right!

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: Before I help you, can you do something for me?

lines.speaker: Zoo keeper
lines.text: I need to know how many animals we have now.
